claims.claim: The codec deterministically maps text into a 48D semantic lane with named warmth/tension/narrative regions.
Dimensionality and trajectory context should not collapse into one integer when narrative arc or held-breath tension spans multiple dimensions.
Existing codec truth channels expose emotional clipping and narrative-arc trajectory without widening the live vector.
Nonlinear high-entropy scaling for warmth/tension markers would change live semantic-vector delivery and needs explicit approval or sandbox evidence first.
evidence: authority_gate:Mike/operator approval required before live codec gain, warmth/tension scaling, reserved dims, or semantic-vector delivery changes
